about_text: iBooks EPUB Converter repackages .epub folders that Apple Books may store as package containers back into standard EPUB ZIP files. Everything runs in your browser; files are never uploaded to a server.
tips_text:
1. If Apple Books returned the book as a folder ending with .epub, use “Choose .epub folder”.

2. If you have regular .epub files, use “Choose EPUB files” — the app will normalize the archive according to EPUB rules.

3. A valid EPUB stores the mimetype file first and uncompressed. The converter does this automatically.

4. DRM/encryption is not removed. Protected books cannot be recovered this way.

5. After conversion, download the recovered.epub file and open it in any reader.
hero_text: Apple Books can save a book as a .epub folder instead of a single file. This tool rebuilds that container into a standard EPUB file on your device.
errors_subtitle: Check the EPUB structure or try choosing the .epub folder itself.
privacy_note: Privacy: conversion runs locally in your browser. Files are not uploaded to IntellectShop servers.
snack_no_folder: No folder selected or the browser did not expose files
